title: Orientation
description: Understand what GoHighLevel is, what jobs use it, and how CRM builders think.
outcome: Explain GHL roles and identify the business process behind a client request.

title: CRM Foundations
description: Contacts, tags, smart lists, custom fields, notes, tasks, and cleanup habits.
outcome: Organize lead records so follow-up and automation are accurate.

title: Pipeline and Sales Process
description: Build opportunity stages and know when leads should move manually or by automation.
outcome: Map a real sales process into a practical GHL pipeline.

title: Calendar and Booking
description: Calendar types, availability, booking links, appointment reminders, and no-show reduction.
outcome: Design a simple booking flow for an appointment-based business.

title: Forms, Funnels, and Lead Capture
description: Forms, surveys, landing pages, thank-you pages, and basic conversion structure.
outcome: Plan a lead capture funnel that sends clean data into the CRM.

title: Communication
description: Conversations inbox, email and SMS templates, follow-up logic, and reply handling.
outcome: Write practical lead follow-up sequences with reply-aware handling.

title: Workflow Automations
description: Triggers, actions, wait steps, if/else logic, notifications, reminders, and re-engagement.
outcome: Build and test automations from client requirements.

title: Client Implementation
description: Onboarding checklists, requirement gathering, process mapping, testing, and troubleshooting.
outcome: Run a small GHL implementation like a reliable operator.

title: External Automations and Advanced Practical Skills
description: Snapshots, sub-accounts, webhooks, API concepts, Make, n8n, Zapier, reporting, and optimization.
outcome: Know when to stay inside GHL and when to connect external automation tools safely.

title: Hire-Ready Portfolio
description: Build five practical portfolio projects, case studies, resume bullets, and interview answers.
outcome: Package your work for VA, CRM assistant, and automation specialist applications.
